strategy: He has no resist, so hit with whatever your school is - just do not waste rounds 1 and 2 on him, since he is untargetable then and targeting him forces a Pass.
Spend the untargetable rounds building blades and clearing the summoned Memory of Katzenstein minion.
He becomes targetable again on round 3, but do not kill him while minions are alive or he Heartbeats back 2,250 health. Clear all minions first.

Which minion and cheats appear depend on the Monstrology Note selected - watch the matching punish: Balance dilutes your traps, Death spikes you for 25% max health per minion killed, Fire adds a +50% global, Ice forces Mega Taunt, Myth adds Hex, Storm throws Wild Bolt.
Clear every Memory of Katzenstein first, then stack blades and burst the Monster in one hit.
cheatNotes: On round 1 he makes himself untargetable.
If you target him while untargetable you are forced to Pass; spells that do not target him still cast.
With no note or Note 1 selected, he summons the Balance Memory of Katzenstein.
He becomes targetable again starting on round 3.
If he is defeated before all his minions are gone, he Heartbeats back 25% of his health (2,250). Clear minions first.
With the Balance minion present, casting any trap makes him cast Trap Dilution on all enemies, weakening your traps.
With the Death minion present, defeating any minion deals 25% of the killer's max health per minion defeated.
That damage still triggers even if the Death minion itself was one of the minions defeated.
With Note 3, at the end of round 3 he casts a Fire spell applying a +50% outgoing-damage global.
That global will not re-trigger if it gets replaced.
The global still triggers even if the Fire minion was defeated on round 3.
With Note 4, the Ice minion casts Mega Taunt on its first active round and every other round after, forcing you to target it.
With the Myth minion present, after he damages a wizard he casts an all-enemies Hex.
With the Storm minion present, he randomly casts Wild Bolt on a random wizard at the end of a round.
